name: ai-coding-loop
description: AI Coding Loop - 8-stage loop engineering plugin for AI-assisted development (Codex CLI)

interface.longDescription: A structured software engineering methodology for AI coding tools. Full lifecycle from requirement intake through spec generation, planning, execution, verification, repair, review, and memory persistence. Supports sub-loops for spec-only, plan-only, dev, test, direct, and review modes.
defaultPrompt: I have a feature to implement: <describe your feature>
